title: Section 141
body: Section 141 in The Code of Civil Procedure, 1908 141. Miscellaneous proceedings .- The procedure provided in this Code in regard to suits shall be followed, as far as it can be made applicable, in all proceedings in any Court of civil jurisdiction. [Explanation .-In this section, the expression "proceedings" includes proceedings under Order IX, but does not include any proceeding under article 226 of the Constitution.]
